messages.content: 语法检查：To assess the stability of the Ni/SAM-11-L4 catalyst, a 10 h test was performed at 613 K condition

.

To assess the stability of the Ni/SAM-11-L4 catalyst, a 10-hour test was performed under 613K conditions.
有错误么
没有明显的错误，但根据上下文语境可能需要适当的修改。
英文重写： The IR bands at 1540 and 1450 cm-1 are assigned to pyridine adsorbed on Brønsted and Lewis acid sites, respectively
The absorption bands at 1540 and 1450 cm-1 indicate the adsorption of pyridine on Brønsted and Lewis acid sites, respectively.

有语法错误么：The bands at 1540 and 1450 cm-1 are assigned to the adsorption of pyridine on Brønsted and Lewis acid sites, respectively. There is no noticeable difference in the content of Lewis and Brønsted acid sites between the catalysts with different metal particle sizes.
该句子没有明显的语法错误。
语法检查：However, for Ni/SAM-11-L1, the n-hexane conversion, selectivity and isomers yield exhibit a minor decrease during the testing period.
该句子语法正确。

语法检查：In this work, SAPO-11 molecular sieve with a moderate acidity, unique pore structure and tunable morphology was chosen as a support for hydroisomerization catalyst [20]. Ni nanoparticles with different sizes were fabricated over the Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst via an ionic liquid assisted method.
该句子语法正确。
英语重写：Theoretical calculation and electron energy loss spectroscopy studies show that the adsorption of hydrogen becomes stronger from terrace to step and then to the corner sites of

According to theoretical calculations and electron energy loss spectroscopy studies, the adsorption of hydrogen progressively strengthens as it transitions from terrace sites to step sites and finally to corner sites.

语法检查：Similar trends at different sites derived from CO-adsorbed FTIR spectroscopy and H2-TPD measurements confirm that the above characterization results testify against each other providing a valid relative measure of the variation of different sites as the particle size changes.

该句存在两个错误，应作如下更正：

Similar trends were observed using CO-adsorbed FTIR spectroscopy and H2-TPD measurements at different sites, which confirm that the above-mentioned characterization results are in agreement and provide a valid relative measure of the variation of different sites with changing particle size.

这句话语法对么：the similar trends of different sites derived from the CO-adsorbed FTIR spectroscopy and H2-TPD measurements provide a valid relative measure of the variation of different sites as particle size is varied.
该句语法是正确的。
说了什么这句话
这句话表达的意思是：用 CO-吸附的 FTIR 光谱和 H2-TPD 测量得到的不同位置的类似趋势提供了一种有效的相对衡量不同位置变化的方法，随着粒子尺寸的改变。
重新英语描述一下

This sentence means that the similar patterns observed in different sites using CO-adsorbed FTIR spectroscopy and H2-TPD measurements offer a dependable indication of changes in the various sites relative to particle size variations.
英语重写降重
Rewrite in a simpler way.

英语重写降重：the similar trends of different sites derived from the CO-adsorbed FTIR spectroscopy and H2-TPD measurements provide a valid relative measure of the variation of different sites as particle size is varied.
The CO-adsorbed FTIR spectroscopy and H2-TPD measurements show similar trends in different sites, which can measure the changes in different sites as the particle size changes.

英语语法检查：the similar trends of different sites derived from the CO-adsorbed FTIR spectroscopy and H2-TPD measurements confirm the CO-adsorbed FTIR spectroscopy results provide a valid relative measure of the variation of different sites as particle size is varied.

该句存在一些不自然和模糊的表达方式。可以更改为：

The similar trends observed in different sites through CO-adsorbed FTIR spectroscopy and H2-TPD measurements confirm that the CO-adsorbed FTIR spectroscopy outcomes can reliably measure the variation in different sites as the particle size changes.
英语重写：the majority of mono-branched intermediates prefer to be hydrogenated before secondary skeletal rearrangements or even cracking.
Most mono-branched intermediates tend to undergo hydrogenation prior to secondary skeletal rearrangements or even cracking.

这些话有重复么：Sufficient surface Ni sites and a high proportion of low coordinated Ni sites over the Ni/SAM-11-L4 facilitates the rapid hydrogenation of the intermediates, resulting in fewer acid-catalyzed steps (nas=1.02) and higher isomers selectivity. Under such circumstance, the acid catalyzed reactions act as the rate limiting step,  most mono-branched intermediates tend to undergo hydrogenation prior to secondary skeletal rearrangements or even cracking.

这些话没有重复，但是可以在句子连接上作出一些修改以增进逻辑连贯和表达准确度。比如：

The presence of sufficient surface Ni sites and a high proportion of low-coordinated Ni sites over the Ni/SAM-11-L4 catalyst facilitates rapid hydrogenation of intermediates, leading to fewer acid-catalyzed steps (nas=1.02) and a higher isomer selectivity. This catalytic environment makes acid-catalyzed reactions the rate-limiting step, which is why most mono-branched intermediates prefer to undergo hydrogenation before undergoing secondary skeletal rearrangements or even cracking.

有语病么：Under such circumstance, the acid catalyzed reactions act as the rate limiting step,  most mono-branched intermediates tend to undergo hydrogenation prior to secondary skeletal rearrangements or even cracking.

这句话有一些语法错误。应改为：

In this case, acid-catalyzed reactions act as the rate-limiting step, causing most mono-branched intermediates to undergo hydrogenation before undergoing secondary skeletal rearrangements or even cracking.
英文阐述：然后进一步在后续结合本文实验数据分析
Subsequently, this will be further analyzed in conjunction with experimental data presented in this article.
语法错误：The fraction of terrace, step and corner sites on Ni particle over the Ni/SAM-11-L1, Ni/SAM-11-L2, Ni/SAM-11-L3 and Ni/SAM-11-L4 catalyst.

该句存在小的语法错误，需要修改。可改为：

This sentence can be corrected as follows:
The fraction of terrace, step, and corner sites on the Ni particles over the Ni/SAM-11-L1, Ni/SAM-11-L2, Ni/SAM-11-L3, and Ni/SAM-11-L4 catalysts.
